title: Bitter Crunchy Lazy-Sunday Millet Stir-fry
description: A vegetarian-friendly lazy-sunday dish featuring millet stir-fried with bitter vegetables and crunchy toppings for a spicy kick in the norteño style.

ingredients.name: Jalapeno pepper, seeded and finely chopped (optional)

instructions: Preheat a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat and add vegetable oil.
Add diced onion, minced garlic, and jalapeno (if using) to the heated pan. Stir-fry for about 1 minute until onions are translucent and fragrant.
Increase heat to high and add finely chopped bell peppers and bitter gourd. Stir-fry for another 5 minutes or until vegetables start to soften but still retain their crunchiness.
Stir in millet, making sure it's evenly coated with the vegetable oil. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes on medium heat.
Add salt (optional) and a dash of chili powder if desired. Stir well to incorporate all ingredients evenly.
Sprinkle sesame seeds over the top of the stir-fry just before serving. Garnish with fresh cilantro leaves for color and added flavor.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course, depending on your preference.
